CLI / TUI

Context

Integrations

Memory — 记忆系统设计
Memory — 记忆系统设计 Memory subsystem Memory v2 — 实体/虚拟两级 + Provenance 导航召回 实体记忆 (Entity Memory) 实体记忆走 Git: Session-Git + Project-Git 抽象记忆 (Virtual Memory)
Proactive Layer — 设计
Proactive Layer — 设计 OpenProgram · 事件层 API Reference OpenProgram · 事件层设计（可视化） OpenProgram · 框架演进（可视化） 三条样板规则 事件与状态（地基） 事件层 总览：跟着一个场景走一遍 框架演进：现状 → 目标 框架自己要守的底线 规则怎么写、怎么跑
Providers
Providers OpenProgram · 报错与超时机制（现状） 请求构建:Context → 各 provider 参数
Auth
API-key / credential resolution unification claude-code 直连订阅(砍掉 Meridian) Credential status redesign — "usable or stopped", no COOLING badge Credential-validation unification Unified account management + pool rotation/fallback Unified self-contained auth storage
Models
Thinking / Effort 子系统设计 模型目录与 Provider 配置
Reliability
Error-taxonomy propagation — structured LLM errors up to the UI LLM-call fault tolerance & timeout management OpenProgram · 报错与超时机制（现状） 模型调用的错误处理与重试决策逻辑
Runtime
Runtime P3 — 三端同步(补全)+ P1/P2 上三端 Runtime — 设计理由 统一 session 上下文创建 长跑 agent 任务的可控性 + 三端一致性

DAG Viewport 设计文档 DAG 布局算法设计文档 DAG 布局算法（可视化） DAG 布局视觉规范 Session DAG 模型—— 数据结构 + 上下文检索 + 两套合并(最终定稿)
Execution
Agent Worktree 工具 Agent 调用流程（权威设计） Agentic 函数防自递归机制 Agentic 函数防自递归机制 — 设计文档（可视化） Async Task 生命周期 Next-step decision making(decision.make / exec(choices=)) Splitting `agent/dispatcher.py` into a responsibility-scoped package
Operations
DAG 边字段重命名设计文档 Multi-agent + per-turn revert: status Rewind — 回退到任意历史消息 User input requests: pausing a run to ask the user 分支自动命名设计文档 分支自动命名设计（可视化） 文件修改管理 — 行业分析与 OpenProgram 设计 统一 parent_id 与 called_by — 设计方案 运行中状态的持久化 / 重连恢复

参考 › 故障排查

Troubleshooting#

Common gotchas. The full operator runbook for a fresh install / upgrade is in GETTING_STARTED.md; this page collects the recurring "it doesn't work" cases.

"No provider available"#

openprogram providers shows what's detected. Common causes:

  • forgot claude login / codex auth / gemini auth login
  • API key set in a different shell than the one running the worker
  • token expired — re-run the CLI login

"command not found: openprogram"#

pip install dir not on PATH. Two options:

# call the module directly
python3 -m openprogram <args>

# or add the user-base bin to PATH (idempotent)
echo 'export PATH="$(python3 -m site --user-base)/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.zshrc

Web UI port in use#

Set one of these env vars before starting the worker:

export OPENPROGRAM_WEB_PORT=8101         # frontend (defaults to 18100)
export OPENPROGRAM_BACKEND_PORT=8102     # FastAPI (defaults to 18109)

Or persist the preference: openprogram config ui.

Local-development install (multi-repo)#

For working on GUI-Agent-Harness / Research-Agent-Harness side-by-side with OpenProgram:

pip install -e "$OPENPROGRAM_DIR"                   # always first
pip install -e "$GUI_HARNESS_DIR"                   # depends on openprogram
pip install -e "$RESEARCH_HARNESS_DIR"

openprogram/functions/agentics/{GUI,Research}-Agent-Harness are symlinks — recreate if a repo moves:

cd openprogram/functions/agentics
rm -f GUI-Agent-Harness  && ln -s "$GUI_HARNESS_DIR"      GUI-Agent-Harness
rm -f Research-Agent-Harness && ln -s "$RESEARCH_HARNESS_DIR" Research-Agent-Harness

pip install -e writes absolute paths — rerun it from the new location if you rename a parent folder.

Worker doesn't start / starts on the wrong port#

openprogram doctor runs a fast end-to-end check: Python deps, Node bundle, providers, MCP, plugins, ports. Read its output before raising an issue.

python -m openprogram._meta agentics_dir returns nothing#

The package isn't installed in the active Python. Either run the installer (clone OpenProgram + ./scripts/install.sh) or activate the venv where it is installed.

CI says "tests pass" but Mac runs differently#

A handful of tests are explicitly skipped on bare CI runners because they need a configured provider in $HOME. The skip list lives in the test files themselves — search for pytest.mark.skipif. Dev machines with credentials see the full suite.

最后更新 · 2026-06-07

本页内容
&quot;No provider available&quot; &quot;command not found: openprogram&quot; Web UI port in use Local-development install (multi-repo) Worker doesn't start / starts on the wrong port python -m openprogram._meta agentics_dir returns nothing CI says &quot;tests pass&quot; but Mac runs differently
